title: Code Review
description: Deep, low-noise code review: 7 focused lenses (correctness, security, performance, maintainability, design, tests, conventions) fan out per file, then every finding is adversarially verified before thresholds apply. Typed findings with applicable patches. Inputs: local git diff, GitHub PR, files, or a snippet. Outputs: Markdown, SARIF, or PR comments. Blocking CI gate.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Or any provider key your adapter needs.

env.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
env.description: Needed only for the github-pr source and the GitHub reporters.
